ideas.title: Making X vs Y â€” Side-By-Side Build, Single Decisive Moment
ideas.one_line_premise: Build two competing variants in parallel on camera; cut every 2-3 seconds across visual varieties; converge on one decisive test where one fails in the last 5%.
evidence: Concept[making]: pat_making_v2 delta_r2 +0.012 â€” title contains making/build/creat/construct. 34 videos avg 19.7M views vs 5.6M rest. 'Making' avg $24M (23 videos).
Concept[anticipation_setup]: 'would happen' bigrams +4.3% retention, 'my body' +3.3%. 46% of videos contain callbacks. anticipatory_frame_pct is top hook_drop_rate reducer (avg_r=-0.401).
Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Structure[dramatic_pacing]: max_cliff_single_drop r_partial=+0.36. deriv_std in v22 model. BIGGER retention drops = MORE views. Pacing complexity beats monotonic decay.
Structure[fast_pacing_no_pauses]: Speech rate r=+0.24 vs retention. Long pauses >1s: r=-0.22 vs retention. Transition words ('so', 'however') drop -11.2% / -8.6%.
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Retention pattern: videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest. Final 5% is THE differentiator for mega-virality.
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median). 'Late peak = 10x more views'.
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60]: Duration sweet spot: 46-60s = 28/98 videos hit 10M+, median 2.9M. 15-30s = death zone (0/11, 513K median). 46-60s balances durationĂ—retention.
Pre-upload lever[scene_burst_count]: r=0.2272, higher â†’ more views.
Pre-upload lever[scene_change_count]: r=0.2267, higher â†’ more views.
Pre-upload lever[frame_cluster_count]: r=0.2266, higher â†’ more views.
Pre-upload lever[visual_variety_entropy]: r=0.2692, higher â†’ more views.
Pre-upload lever[beat_count]: r=0.2259, higher â†’ more views.

ideas.title: Would You Believe ____? â€” Anticipation-Setup with 10x Late-Peak Reveal
ideas.one_line_premise: Open on a tight close-up and a spoken anticipation phrase ("you won't believe what happened whenâ€¦"), set up the stakes, and withhold the proof until the 60-80% mark.
evidence: Concept[anticipation_setup]: 'would happen' bigrams +4.3% retention, 'my body' +3.3%. 46% of videos contain callbacks. anticipatory_frame_pct is top hook_drop_rate reducer (avg_r=-0.401).
Concept[visceral_body]: Retention patterns: visceral words +5.9% (painful), +4.3% (difference), +2.5% (hurt). 'Late visceral amplification': 'crazy' at Q1=0 â†’ Q4=+0.060.
Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).
Hook[frame_relatability_at_hook_quarter] via duration_s (principle princ_00013, n=36, csw=0.201).
Structure[late_peak_arc]: Retention pattern: videos peaking at 60-80% get ~10x more views than early-peaking (5.2M vs 530K median). 'Late peak = 10x more views'.
Structure[callback_closure]: has_callback r=0.14 vs keep. 46% of videos use callbacks. 'Anticipation phrases retain': would-happen, my-body bigrams.
Structure[dramatic_pacing]: max_cliff_single_drop r_partial=+0.36. deriv_std in v22 model. BIGGER retention drops = MORE views. Pacing complexity beats monotonic decay.
Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Retention pattern: videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest. Final 5% is THE differentiator for mega-virality.
Duration[sweet_spot_46_60]: Duration sweet spot: 46-60s = 28/98 videos hit 10M+, median 2.9M. 15-30s = death zone (0/11, 513K median). 46-60s balances durationĂ—retention.
Pre-upload lever[pivot_word_count]: r=0.2412, higher â†’ more views.
Pre-upload lever[visual_variety_entropy]: r=0.2692, higher â†’ more views.

ideas.title: Superhero-Framed Physical Challenge â€” Direct-Address Hook, Body-On-The-Line Payoff
ideas.one_line_premise: Cast yourself (or subject) as a superhero-coded challenger; look camera-in in the first 3 seconds, state the premise visibly, and land a painful/visceral reveal past midpoint.
evidence: Concept[superhero]: cat_superhero included in v9 and v13 models. Concept category delivered the first large step above baseline (+0.09 RÂ˛).
Concept[visceral_body]: Retention patterns: visceral words +5.9% (painful), +4.3% (difference), +2.5% (hurt). 'Late visceral amplification': 'crazy' at Q1=0 â†’ Q4=+0.060.

ideas.title: Making Something Indestructible â€” 60s Stress-Test with Late Visceral Payoff
ideas.one_line_premise: Build or assemble a seemingly fragile object, narrate a physical stress-test, and deliver the visceral reveal at 75-90% of runtime.
evidence: Concept[making]: pat_making_v2 delta_r2 +0.012 â€” title contains making/build/creat/construct. 34 videos avg 19.7M views vs 5.6M rest. 'Making' avg $24M (23 videos).
Concept[indestructible]: indestructible_x_prev_keep delta_r2 +0.026 â€” concept Ă— previous keep interaction. Indestructible release after a high-keep video = super-viral.
Hook[compound_frame_close_up_X_segment_setup_at_first_10s] via swipe_away_rate (principle princ_00034, n=65, csw=-0.148).

Structure[golden_final_5pct]: Retention pattern: videos at 95-99% percentile gain +8.0% above baseline vs -0.4% rest. Final 5% is THE differentiator for mega-virality.
